mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password_hash AS passwordHash, u.display_name AS displayName, u.email, u.status, u.created_at AS createdAt, u.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_user u WHERE u.username = #{username}
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
